title: Built an AI Script Writer in 3 Minutes (Claude API Demo)
hook: Watch me build an AI that writes complete YouTube scripts in seconds

sections.name: Hook - Show Final Result
sections.script: Dekho - main type kar raha hun 'AI productivity tips' aur boom! Ek complete YouTube script ready ho gaya. 200+ words, proper structure, even thumbnail ideas included. Aur ye sab maine banaya hai sirf 3 minutes mein using Claude API. Chaliye dekhte hain kaise!
sections.visual_notes: Screen recording: Type prompt, show instant script generation with all sections populated. Quick montage of the final output

sections.name: Problem Setup
sections.script: Content creators ki sabse badi problem kya hai? Script writing! Hours lagते हैं research mein, structure sochने mein. But what if I told you - ek simple tool bana kar ye sab automate kar sakte hain?
sections.visual_notes: Quick shots of frustrated content creator, multiple browser tabs open, notepad with messy script drafts

sections.name: Live Build Start
sections.script: Alright, let's build this live! Pehle main Claude console mein jaata hun. API key generate karta hun - obviously ye private rahega. Now, simple HTML file banata hun with basic structure.
sections.visual_notes: Screen recording: Navigate to Claude console, generate API key (blur the actual key), open VS Code, create new HTML file

sections.name: Code Implementation
sections.script: HTML form bana raha hun - topic input, script type dropdown. JavaScript mein fetch call setup kar raha hun Claude API ke liye. Dekho main prompt engineering kar raha hun - structure define kar raha hun, JSON format specify kar raha hun. Ye important hai!
sections.visual_notes: Screen recording: Type HTML form quickly, show JavaScript code being written, highlight the prompt structure and JSON format specification

sections.name: Testing & Demo
sections.script: Bas ho gaya! Let's test this. Main type karta hun 'AI tools for coding' - submit karta hun aur... wait for it... Perfect! Complete script with hook, sections, CTA, even tags included. Thumbnail ideas bhi suggest kar raha hai!
sections.visual_notes: Screen recording: Test the tool, show loading state, reveal the generated script with all sections, scroll through the output

sections.name: Quick Enhancements
sections.script: Isko aur better banate hain. Copy button add karta hun, error handling dalता hun, aur styling thoda improve karta hun. Production ready tool ban गया! Cost bhi minimal hai - sirf API calls ke liye pay karna hai.
sections.visual_notes: Screen recording: Add copy functionality, basic CSS styling, test error scenarios, show the polished final version

sections.name: Real-world Usage
sections.script: Ab real mein use kar ke dekhte हैं. Different niches try karta hun - tech, finance, lifestyle. Har baar relevant, engaging script mil rahi hai. Content creators ke liye ye game-changer hai!
sections.visual_notes: Quick montage: Generate scripts for different topics, show variety in outputs, highlight the quality and relevance

sections.name: Wrap-up & Value
sections.script: Guys, total time laga sirf 3 minutes! Ek tool ready hai jo hours ka work seconds mein kar deta hai. Best part - ye customize kar sakte हो अपनी needs के according. Script style change karना हो, format modify करना हो - सब possible है!
sections.visual_notes: Screen showing the complete working tool, quick demonstration of customization options

call_to_action: Code chahiye? Description mein GitHub link hai. Aur aise aur AI tools banana seekhना है toh channel subscribe karo - next week Claude API ke advanced features dikhaunga!
thumbnail_ideas: Split screen: Before (messy script drafts) vs After (clean generated script)
